evals.name: b2b-proof-selection
evals.prompt: We have 12 customer quotes and usage data. Decide which proof to put on a B2B landing page and explain why.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: testimonial-audit
evals.prompt: Audit these testimonials for credibility, specificity, similarity, and fake-proof risk.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
